mapper.sql: pay.id AS pay_id, pay.amount AS pay_amount, pay.status AS pay_status, pay.transaction_id AS pay_transaction_id, pay.payment_method AS pay_payment_method, pay.razorpay_order_id AS pay_razorpay_order_id, pay.razorpay_payment_id AS pay_razorpay_payment_id, pay.razorpay_signature AS pay_razorpay_signature, pay.created_at AS pay_created_at, pay.updated_at AS pay_updated_at, p.id AS p_id, p.gender AS p_gender, p.date_of_birth AS p_date_of_birth, p.address AS p_address, p.blood_group AS p_blood_group, p.allergies AS p_allergies, p.emergency_contact AS p_emergency_contact, p.created_at AS p_created_at, p.updated_at AS p_updated_at, pu.id AS pu_id, pu.name AS pu_name, pu.mobile_number AS pu_mobile_number, pu.email AS pu_email, pu.role AS pu_role, pu.is_active AS pu_is_active, pu.created_at AS pu_created_at, pu.updated_at AS pu_updated_at, a.id AS a_id, a.code AS a_code, a.appointment_date AS a_appointment_date, a.start_time AS a_start_time, a.end_time AS a_end_time, a.status AS a_status, a.reason AS a_reason, a.notes AS a_notes, a.symptoms AS a_symptoms, a.created_at AS a_created_at, a.updated_at AS a_updated_at, d.id AS d_id, d.qualification AS d_qualification, d.experience AS d_experience, d.bio AS d_bio, d.availability_status AS d_availability_status, d.experience_years AS d_experience_years, d.consultation_fee AS d_consultation_fee, d.is_verified AS d_is_verified, d.total_experience AS d_total_experience, d.created_at AS d_created_at, d.updated_at AS d_updated_at, du.id AS du_id, du.name AS du_name, du.mobile_number AS du_mobile_number, du.email AS du_email, du.role AS du_role, du.is_active AS du_is_active, du.created_at AS du_created_at, du.updated_at AS du_updated_at, s.id AS s_id, s.name AS s_name, s.description AS s_description, s.created_at AS s_created_at, s.updated_at AS s_updated_at

FROM payments pay JOIN patients p ON p.id = pay.patient_id JOIN users pu ON pu.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN appointments a ON a.id = pay.appointment_id LEFT JOIN doctors d ON d.id = a.doctor_id LEFT JOIN users du ON du.id = d.user_id LEFT JOIN specializations s ON s.id = d.specialization_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY pay.created_at DESC, pay.id DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND created_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments ( appointment_id, patient_id, amount, status, transaction_id, payment_method, razorpay_order_id, razorpay_payment_id, razorpay_signature, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{appointment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{patient.id}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{transactionId}, #{paymentMethod}, #{razorpayOrderId}, #{razorpayPaymentId}, #{razorpaySignature}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE payments SET appointment_id = #{appointment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, patient_id = #{patient.id}, amount = #{amount}, status = #{status}, transaction_id = #{transactionId}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, razorpay_order_id = #{razorpayOrderId}, razorpay_payment_id = #{razorpayPaymentId}, razorpay_signature = #{razorpaySignature}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id}
